positive: A vibrant, retro vaporwave landscape featuring a crystalline palm tree silhouetted against a neon sunset. Grid lines stretch into the distance, surrounded by geometric shapes and pastel pink and cyan gradients. Synthwave aesthetic, 80s arcade art, vector illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photographic, natural elements, messy lines
